releaseNotes: CRITICAL: Quests+tasks now persist to localStorage. Daily Tasks section removed. Quests only from protocols/habits/books/weak-points. AI has persistent memory — no more asking questions every time.

notes: CRITICAL FIX: Quests and tasks were never saved to localStorage — now persisted properly
Removed Daily Tasks section — Quest Board is now quests-only (full width)
Quest engine rewritten: quests only from your protocols, habits, books, and weak-point detection
No more random filler quests — every quest is tied to something you created
Weak-point detection: analyzes your 6 stats and generates quests for your lowest stat
AI persistent memory: agents now know your name, goals, stats, streak, recent quest completions, failed quests, and Shadow conversation history
AI no longer asks 'What's your name?' or 'What are your goals?' every time — it already knows
AI behavioral rules: references weakest stat, streak count, suggests specific actions from your protocols
Removed dummy protocol placeholder text in Training Hub
FIXED: Shadow Chat LLM — model stored in userData (survives updates), errors visible, Activate/Re-download buttons
FIXED: Update checking + changelog panel — now shows full changelog
NEW: Quest anti-cheat — time-locked completion, confirmation dialog, proof-of-completion
NEW: Auto-generated daily quests from protocols, habits, books
CRITICAL FIX: Preload script broken by ESM/CJS mismatch
Fix: Animations not rendering on some laptops — GPU compatibility switches
Update preserves ALL user data — no more reset after updating
Store items now cheap (2-5 NC)
Fixed Local LLM install button, store prices, update crash
Store preview modal, PDF training guides, sound effects, achievement burst, charts, export/import
Shadow Chat redesign, first-time tutorial, Mission Debrief, EXP overhaul
Shadow Chat persona selector, CPU-only LLM inference, website overhaul
Effort-mirror tone, streak window, domain badges, Mission Debrief, Changelog panel
Manual update button, logout clears data, splash animation, HabitLab, multi-agent wiring
Initial public release
